UNIUNI.name: UNIUNI
UNIUNI.notes: Max 30lbs. Oversize if any dim >18in or perimeter >150cm. Overweight $10/lb over 20lbs.

GOFO.name: GOFO
GOFO.notes: Max 20lbs. Oversize $25 if exceeds 19x15x11in. Overweight $25 if >10lbs.

SmartPost.name: FedEx SmartPost
SmartPost.notes: Ineligible if longest >27in or perimeter >105in or 2nd longest >17in. Min 20lbs when perimeter 64-105in.

UPS.name: UPS
UPS.notes: Ineligible if longest >47in or 2nd longest >29.5in or perimeter >102in.

FedEx.name: FedEx
FedEx.notes: Ineligible if longest >47in or 2nd longest >29.5in or perimeter >102in.

FedExAHS.name: FedEx AHS
FedExAHS.notes: Ineligible if longest >108in or perimeter >165in. Min 40lbs for AHS-Dim, min 90lbs for Oversize.

FedExOS.name: FedEx OS
FedExOS.notes: For 90-150lbs. Always min 90lbs billed. Ineligible if longest >108in or perimeter >165in.

TEST.name: TEST
TEST.notes: Placeholder carrier for new suppliers without pricing yet. Update rates in 尾程运费报价 before using.
